entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop being studied for resistance to the pod borer pest.

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The pod borer pest that affects chickpea crops.

entities.name: TOLERANCE TO HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The ability of chickpea to withstand infestation by Helicoverpa armigera.

entities.name: PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The general ability of a plant to resist insect pests.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A population of lines used to characterize biochemical components associated with tolerance.

entities.name: TOTAL PHENOL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of phenols in chickpea leaves, associated with tolerance to H. armigera.

entities.name: ORGANIC ACID PROFILES
entities.description: The composition of organic acids in leaf exudates associated with tolerance to H. armigera.

entities.name: MALIC ACID
entities.description: One of the major organic acids identified in chickpea leaf exudates.

entities.name: OXALIC ACID
entities.description: One of the major organic acids identified in chickpea leaf exudates.

entities.name: ACETIC ACID
entities.description: One of the major organic acids identified in chickpea leaf exudates.

entities.name: CITRIC ACID
entities.description: One of the major organic acids identified in chickpea leaf exudates.

entities.name: FUMARIC ACID
entities.description: One of the major organic acids identified in chickpea leaf exudates.

entities.name: HIGH PERFORMANCE LIQUID CHROMATOGRAPHY
entities.description: The analytical technique used to profile organic acids in leaf exudates.

entities.name: EGG COUNT
entities.description: A measure of pod borer infestation used to assess tolerance.

entities.name: LARVAL INCIDENCE
entities.description: A measure of pod borer infestation used to assess tolerance.

entities.name: POD DAMAGE
entities.description: A measure of pod borer infestation used to assess tolerance.
